title: selaginella extensa
intro: Selaginella extensa, also known as Spike Moss, is a type of evergreen plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its unique, fern-like appearance. Traditionally, Selaginella extensa has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving respiratory function, and protecting against oxidative damage. In terms of herbal preparations, Selaginella extensa is often consumed as a tea or used in combination with other herbs to create supplements, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
